• A 3D match-3 puzzle game with voxel blocks where players swap adjacent blocks to create matches of 3 or more same-colored pieces
  • Features auto-play mode, hint system, and visual effects including particle explosions and fluid background animations
  • Includes level selection with pre-made pixel art targets, custom image importer, and win screen with sharing/export options
  • Responsive design with mobile support, smooth animations using Three.js, and modern glass-morphism UI
    class Block { constructor(x, y, charKey, powerupType = 'none') { /*...*/ } }
    function findMatches() { /* returns matched blocks and sequences */ }

This is a 3D match-3 puzzle game built with Three.js featuring voxel blocks that players swap to create matches. The game includes auto-play mode, hint system, and visual effects like particle explosions. Players can choose from pre-made levels with pixel art targets or import custom images. The responsive design supports both desktop and mobile, with smooth animations and a modern glass-morphism UI including a sidebar for controls and art display.
